name: Sixteen Years
overview: When Meret and Simon are called away from their daughter's birthday to receive a wounded agent in their safe house, the man immediately raises red flags.

name: The Truth After
overview: After setting a trap to see who's after them, Meret and Simon are each confronted with a familiar face, complicating their efforts to keep their cover.

name: Belarus
overview: Gregor's life hangs by a thread. Meret discovers another one of Simon's lies. Julika begins to suspect the presence of a mole inside the BND.

name: What Have We Done?
overview: While Simon confides in Katya and Meret strikes out on her own to gain a new ally, Koleev doubles his efforts to draw them out in the open.

name: StarFish
overview: Julika digs deeper into the Belarus connection. Katya arranges a meeting with Koleev, leading him right to the doorstep of Meret and Simon.

name: Still Alive
overview: Unable to let go, Koleev descends upon the safe house with everything he's got. Meret and Simon will have to trust each other in order to survive.
